e2e_harness.what: drive a sandboxed instance end-to-end as a human would (isolated ports/state)
e2e_harness.command: familydiagram-testing MCP bridge (real app UI) against sandboxed Flask on port 8889
e2e_harness.notes: Production Flask on 8888 is user-managed - never touch. Sandbox stack: Flask 8889 + isolated Celery broker. Training app web UI via chrome-devtools MCP.

subharnesses.personal_app: familydiagram-testing MCP (get_app_state() first; headless=false for screenshots)
subharnesses.extraction_f1: FD-338-style real-LLM extraction battery with F1 comparison vs stored baseline (+/-0.05 band)

referee.notes: SETUP GAP: no referee implementation exists in this project. FD-338 closed evidence-based without tokens. Pending Patrick's call (flagged at ground).

jira.via: REST v2/v3, basic auth patrick@alaskafamilysystems.com + ATLASSIAN_TOKEN from ~/theapp/.env (extract with grep|cut, not source), site https://alaskafamilysystems.atlassian.net

pr_lookup: gh pr list --repo patrickkidd/{repo} --head {branch} --state open --json url --jq '.[].url'
